productDisplayName: Puma Women TP Funky Workout Black Track Pants
description: CompositionBlack funky track pants made of 100% polyester, has a soft and broad elasticated waistband with drawcords, reinforced stitching over the crotch area and other tear points, mesh patch along the side seams, elasticated band at the ankles, and brand logo at the left hipFittingSlimWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanA split second can mean the difference between winning and losing. To ensure you're always on the winning side, this track pant from puma is designed to give you that added advantage. Its state-of-the-art technology provides a form-fitted lightweight design. Pair it with a round neck T-shirt and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears track pants of length 39"Height: 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
